title: Venerable Bede Church of England Academy (Sunderland): warning notice
body: "Notice relating to: Venerable Bede Church of England Academy  URN: 139184  Notice issued to: Northern Lights Learning Trust  Reason for issue:  ‘requires significant improvement’ Ofsted judgement  DfE regional director: Katherine Cowell  DfE regional director office: North East  Local authority: Sunderland City Council "

taxons.title: Inspection of maintained schools and academies
